violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Odor at bottom drawer of bread table. -Carbon in bottom of left oven.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. *Kitchen due for a deep clean i.e. -Dust/debris at ceiling vents in kitchen. -Dust/debris build up behind dishwasher. -Debris at walls around hand sink.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Employee items at bottom shelf of table near entrance. -Employee items were stored throughout kitchen.
General premises. — --Mop room is poorly organized and in disarray.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Bread station butter found at 38-60F. (Ice water only along bottom of product.) -Ravioli filling dated 01/07/25 found with temperature of 46F in bottom of right refrigerator. *Unsure of cause- improper cooling or storage of cooling personal food next to product.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
